chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1948 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For order on office objection No.1. 2. For hearing of CMA No.9655/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 26-05-2025 Mr. Rashid Mahar, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Deputy Attorney General along with Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Naimatullah, Deputy Director IREN Squad/I & I-IR Mr. Azam Nafees, Assistant Director (Audit) IREN/I & I-IR. Learned counsel for the petitioner states under instructions that the issue has been resolved, therefore, the petition may be disposed of as having served its purpose. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
